reviews.review_text: Yes, I was there this morning and I didn’t pool have to wait. I was very surprised about that and everybody was very nice. I found out I have bronchitis not contagious. They did x-rays and doctor nurse came in and checked me out everything everything is great. Everybody was great. The only problem I had is when I was leaving. It was a little after 12. They said I have prescription that they’re called in at CVS pharmacy at the crossing and the nurse said also you need to get a breathing machine. I said OK what kind of breathing machine she said breathing machine just inhale and it helps you breathe so I went to CVS pharmacy and I bought one it cost me $60 at 1:30. I found out that they called in for a nebulizer that works with the prescription that you guys gave me so I wasted $60 but that’s OK. I hope this works. Everybody was fine. I do appreciate it. Thank you.
The best urgent care! Always quick.
From the registration at the front desk to the nurses staff everyone was very caring.
Very professional, courteous
Superb staff; i was well attended and i walked out with my medication, feeling better. Thank you.

Received excellent care and doctor did all necessary to see what was wrong with me.
Send me the appropriate medicines with complete instructions. Also administration and staff was caring and very kind while asking questions to concerning my health.
I could not have hoped for a better experience.  I was seen and taken care of quickly and competently.  Thankyou.

I can always depend on Urgent Care to address my health needs quickly. Sometimes they are the only ones that can see a patient quickly as needed. Short waits. Exceptionally competent medical personnel. Friendly staff. What more is there to ask for?

Friendly staff

The nurse who assist wasn’t that approachable and the doctor told me that is better come before 7 pm before the shift change I wasn’t happy about that I was dehydrated and he didn’t order the blood work and and I told him that I suffer from Crohn’s and all the information provide me at the discharge was is reference to this. They only did the COVID Test.
Everyone was so nice and helpful.

I went on Memorial Day expecting hours of waiting, but in less than 1 hour, I was with a doctor examining my condition. I was able to get my medicine there as well. This is an amazing place and system. Thank you!

From the front desk to the Rn and PA everybody was comforting and professional. Only one suggestion is that u make the clinic more senior friendly. The entering of the scan code to register is a little overwhelming for seniors who are ill as it is . Let’s go back to fill out paperwork and give your insurance.

I arrived around 5:50 and by 6:55 I was on my way home with my diagnosis and not only the prescriptions but also my medications, the place is very clean, the receptionist was OK…… but the staff nurses and doctors are beyond professionalism, I was  amazed by this place. Suuuuper recommended!
Excellent assistance by all the personnel

I recently had an extremely upsetting experience at a Baptist urgent care. I went in experiencing severe shortness of breath and panic, genuinely believing something was seriously wrong with me. I later learned it was an anxiety attack, but at the time I was terrified.

When I walked in, I was not acknowledged at all. The front desk staff kept looking down typing while I stood there visibly distressed asking for help. I felt ignored and completely dismissed during one of the scariest moments I’ve experienced.

What made it worse was being told during my panic that there was basically nothing they could do for me, which only heightened my distress. Regardless of whether someone is having a heart attack, a panic attack, or any other medical concern, patients deserve compassion, reassurance, and humane treatment.

As someone who has worked within Baptist Health before, this experience was deeply disappointing because I know how important patient care and empathy are supposed to be.

The only bright spot was one older nurse with blonde hair and blue eyes, possibly from Tavernier or Mariners, who showed genuine compassion and helped calm me down. She was the only person who treated me like a human being that day, and I’m incredibly grateful for her kindness.

I hope this urgent care reevaluates how patients are welcomed and treated, especially those arriving scared, vulnerable, and in visible distress.
I had a great experience.
I was very thankful for the excellent care from the Doctor and the nurse. The front desk in the front the lady was excellent.

I wanted to thank the nurse and the doctor , my apologies for not remembering their names, for being so helpful and caring of my situation at the time of my visit,  I was treated with so much care and compassion that when I left the center I was feeling a million times better. Thank you very much for all your help in solving my problem.
Excellent service.
Excellent, especially the nurse who made

I haven’t been at the doctors for a while but after such a great visit I’ll go more often.

It is always a very pleasant experience to go to this site for my health scares 😅. They are caring, supportive, and understanding. Dr. Fito is an awesome doctor who “sees you” as a unique human being and has vast knowledge. He has helped me a lot to understand my issues. Love you guys!!! 💕💖

I have been to Baptist Health Urgent Care several times.  The staff is always welcoming and courteous.  The doctors and nurses are exceptional and take the time to answer all your questions and address any concerns.  The facility itself is spotless!  I highly recommend Baptist Health Urgent Care in Kendall!
They saw me immediately.  The staff was competent and saw to it I was taken care of quickly.
there was no long wait, everyone was friendly and I was on my way within a couple hours.  However, I was told I would get my test results in a few days and one week later I'm still waiting.

It was a quick process but they really didn’t help with anything. I ended up going to my pcp the next day and she said they didn’t even try to diagnose my issue (which I already knew). My pcp gave me an actual checkup and was able to treat me. I would not recommend this place.

I went in with abdominal pain due to possible cholelithiasis; they didn't give me anything for the pain and sent me to my primary care doctor to get a referral to a specialist, telling me that if the pain became severe, I should go to the emergency room.

Thank you, Balti, for this invaluable resource that alleviates our pain and reduces overcrowding at the hospital. Thank you again.
reviews.original_review_text: Es imposible en pocas palabras describir de qué manera tan atenta veloz y eficiente. Fui atendido en esta oficina de emergencia del balti Hospital. reviews.review_text: Service was fast and professional.

Absolutely stellar! The nurses were all very kind, helpful and patient, despite clearly being very busy and working hard. The appointment didn’t take tediously long given how there were several other patients there, and the cleanliness along with the environment felt overall up to standard and about as good as you can get. Definitely reccomend for anybody that is seeking medical attention and wants an environment that doesn’t feel nauseating but instead feels decently welcoming and comfortable.

Excellent. Everyone was great. Fast and effective medical assistance and treatment.
Very professional everything was clean.And the nurse and Doctor were on top of all the patients with care.

I always go to this place when I need it, and so far I've been very happy with the care I've received. From the reception staff to the nurses and doctors, they are all highly trained. I recommend this place 100%.
reviews.original_review_text: Siempre acuerdo a este lugar cuando lo necesito y hasta ahora me siento muy bien con la atención recibida,desde el personal de recepción,enfermeros y médicos,son personas bien preparadas,es un lugar q recomiendo un 100 %

reviews.review_text: All the staff were very attentive and professional. Dr. Lopez del Castillo is the best doctor you can have the privilege of knowing and being attended by

Very attentive, very clean, prompt to tending me & getting my results & medicine within minutes. The young lady RN named Victoria, took care of me & was very attentive, as well as friendly & professional. The X-ray technician was also a very friendly, polite young lady. The Dr was a young man named Dr Moshe Yatzman, also friendly, polite & professional. The staff was outgoing & very supportive throughout my visit. Thank you all very much & please continue your great work!
Excellent service, everyone was very friendly. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena atención, muy amables todos. Gracias.

reviews.review_text:
The doctors, nurses, X-ray technicians, and other staff were very kind and capable.

And the place was very clean and tidy throughout.

Thank you very much for your excellent care.
reviews.original_review_text:
Médicos, Enfermeras, Técnicos de rayos x, y demás trabajadores muy amables y capaces.
Y un lugar muy limpio ordenado en su totalidad.
Muchas gracias por su esmerada atención.

reviews.review_text: Very professional.   Dr and staff.
Excellent

I went to Baptist Health for an X-ray and had a really good experience. The wait time was short, which I appreciated. Everyone I interacted with was friendly and attentive.

The doctor was helpful and took the time to answer my questions. The X-ray technician was knowledgeable and made me feel comfortable during the process.

I also liked that they had technology in the room to help with questions and payment  (I was a bit surprised at first 😅) everything felt easy and organized. Overall, it was a smooth visit and I’m glad I chose this location.
The best team ever. Amazing service

Excellent services and customer service
From the beginning to the end
The nurse who looked over me, was excellent!!!!! Comforting when needed, answered all my questions
Excellence service
Excellent service provided by all staff, fast and quality attention.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente servicio prestado por parte de todo el personal, atención rápida y de calidad.

reviews.review_text: Excellent service, very professional, extremely kind, I am super pleased with the care my daughter received.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atencion,muy profesionales, extremadamente amables,súper complacida con la atención a mi niña.

reviews.review_text: Great Place for medical care.

Sad to say that my most recent experience with this location was not OK. Obviously, when you arrive to an urgent care, you’re feeling awful, that’s why you’re there. From the moment I arrived, the two ladies at the front desk could not have been chatting any louder, and nonstop. Then, after I was escorted inside to be triaged, and seen by the doctor, the doctor’s demeanor was unprofessional. The icing on the cake was that the test that was performed to test for the flu and Covid, came back negative, but after my going to the ER, it turns out that the flu test was positive, therefore; they did it incorrectly. Bottom line, that location needs work and better training. Baptist prides itself in providing excellent Customer Service, and my experience yesterday was opposite of that at this location. The bit of saving grace was the nurse assigned to me, who was nice and attentive.
Great staff. Short wait. Highly recommend.
Excellent service, very friendly and attentive staff
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención, personal muy amables y atentos

reviews.review_text: Good
The service there is outstanding!  I walked in with shoulder and arm pain.  Just 45 minutes later, I had an x-ray done, got a shot for the pain and was happily on my way home feeling better.
Great service

Excellent, they always provide great care and the doctors are helpful. In 2022, I went to the emergency room with chest pain and they immediately sent me to the hospital where I later had a heart attack. They saved my life, thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente, siempre tienen una buena atención y los médicos son serviciales, en el 2022 fui a emergencia por dolor de pecho y me mandaron inmediatamente al Hospital donde después tuve un infarto me salvaron la vida gracias

reviews.review_text: Excellent service

Our experience, as always, was excellent! The nurses were very attentive and professional, and Dr. [Name] was a very kind and professional person! We've been going to Urgent Care for over 8 years and have no complaints! Excellent!
reviews.original_review_text: Nuestra experiencia como siempre muy buena!!! Las enfermeras muy atentas y profesionales un la Drao y una persona my humana y profesional!!! Nosotros vamos al Urgent care por más de 8 años y no tenemos quejas !!!! Excelente

reviews.review_text: The care that I received was wonderful from the person who took my blood pressure to the doctor that came to examine me to the radiologist that took me to do my x-rays and my CT scan and the person who came to put on my hand splint. The part that was a bit challenging and uncomfortable was the way I was received when I arrived at the facility. When I arrived, they had me waiting because they were having some issues with printing something for another staff member and had asked me for my date of birth, but continued to deal with the Printing issue and never really addressed me the patient. I felt like I was in the way and that maybe I shouldn’t be there to get care from this facility. That is just a front office issue the person who was there and others who were there were just trying to solve some sort of problem and I was in their way. That’s how I felt. Other than that, I would’ve given five stars.
Excellent facility, very clean, professional staff. However, the nurse did not do a good job with the IV fusion. After, I got home I noticed a huge bump on my elbow. See attached pictures.
This is the facility we always go to.  Good doctors and staff. They don't rush you and explain everything.
Very easy and professional
My go to Baptist Urgent care for years. Excellent care, always.  Never have I had to wait for more than an hour from getting there to being discharged.
Dr. Orozco, the best! We've never had such good and fast service as we received today. Everyone who works there is very professional.
reviews.original_review_text: Doctor OROZCO  la mejor nunca hemos tenido una atencion tan Buena y rapida como la que tuvinos hoy Bien profecionales todos los que trabajan alli

reviews.review_text: Keep doing what you are doing!
I was seen very quickly, great bedside manner and felt very safe. Facility is very clean.
Excellent and fast care by wonderful Doctors and nurses! Everyone very friendly and caring!
Very professional and friendly atmosphere. Willing to help.
Good staff. Fast attention.  Very clean and good place. Thank you
Everyone was pleasant and respectful.  The Doctor was engaging.  I appreciate how I was treated.
Great service and very quick turn around.
They treated me quickly, diagnosed me and gave me my medications. great service
Very professional and love the nurse Zasha

My child arrived with a wound from a fall at daycare; he needed stitches. He received excellent care during the consultation, and the nurse, doctor, and assistant assigned to him were all very professional. They did a great job, and I sincerely hope we never find ourselves in a similar situation again. But if we do, I won't hesitate to seek help from Baptist Health Urgent Care.
reviews.original_review_text: Mi niño llego con una herida provocada por una caida en el day care, necesitaba sutura.El fue muy bien atendido en la consulta y tanto la enfermera ,el medico y el asistente que le asignaron fueron muy profecionales, hicieron muy buen trabajo y la verdad ojalá y no tengamos que vernos en otra situación como está, pero de ser así no dudaré en buscar ayuda en Baptist Health Urgent Care

reviews.review_text: It was a great experience.  Excellent service all around.  The attending physician gave a through explanation of the diagnosis and the steps he was recommending to make me feel better now and going forward.  The nurse that assisted me was also very compassionate and professional.  Thank you for helping me feel better 🙏.
The registration with app was super easy. Waiting was reasonable and the doctor and nurse were courteous and professional

Amazing doctor, nurse and tech!! Suli and Carly were so sweet and attentive they made me feel comfortable with everything and the doctor, he was amazing. Great bedside manner and attention to all my symptoms.

Absolutely excellent. Maria our nurse took such great care with my Lil boy. It was fast and caring. Hard to explain a good experience when you are at an urgent care but they made this whole thing as great as could be given the circumstances. Thank you Maria and the entire staff from front reception to the the doctor!

We had to cancel our Pediatric Associates appointment (always a nightmare) because my son’s ear infection was causing excruciating pain. My husband took him WOW , from the moment of entry until the absolute very end . Such efficiency , urgency , such care that we have not encountered in a long time . Exceptional service !!! Everything was explained and done with such bedside manner & professionalism .
Excellent and prompt service .

Very professional and kind people 5 Stars to all of you thank you!!!!
Today 07/07/25 and like always all of them are kind, professional wonderful people thank you for everything ❤️❤️

They were very nice but I don’t think that what was prescribed was the right med. I went in because I had such a pain and sensitivity in my left shoulder that it spread from my neck to my forearm. This is the third day with pain that through x-rays was determined to be arthritis. I can’t even brush my hair in a bun like I usually do and I’m dressing with a lot of difficulty and pain. I have no one to help me.

I desisted taking Cyclonbenzaprine (muscle relaxer) that was prescribed. This pill dries my mouth so much that I drank water all day and was constantly peeing numerous times during the day and night, not to mention that I have incontinence. That was no good and I stopped taking it after the second pill.

The Ibuprofen of 600 MG has helped to calm the pain but for a very limited time therefore, I am not following the instructions either and I still can’t lift my left arm. I’m taking 2 pills every 6 hours instead of one pill every six hours.

I needed a pain killer even if it was for a limited amount of days but sometimes I think that doctors, practitioners and staff think that I was into pain killers. They don’t know me of course that I hate taking pills!!
Excellent and thorough service.

Nothing worse than feeling a doctor did not listen. I am very disappointed in my care. Given a cough suppressant but she was not interested in the why! I want the why. I explained that I was in a car accident all airbags deployed. Cough started while in car felt I had a reaction to the chemical involved in the deployment of the air bag. I was ignored. Cough suppressant not working throat extremely irritated and sore. I have no cold symptoms.
Great service everyone was very nice and very professional and was attended quickly .

This is exactly how a hospital visit should go. When is not an emergency of course. I remember years ago when these care centers didn't exist, you would have to loose a whole day for a sprained ankle. 1 hour and 20 and I was out. With the medicine I need as well. Thank you all doctors and nurses who work there.
Very good, a wonderful team and great professionals
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena es un equipo de trabajo maravilloso y grandes profesionales

reviews.review_text: VERY FRIENDLY AND PROFESIONAL WITH VERY QUICK AND EXPEDITIOUS ATTENTION, ALSO, GREAT FACILITIES!
Excellent service and quick. Thank you.
Excellent service.
front desk, RN, MD, Rad Tech great!
My toe was mad, but Alfredo and Maria were great. Super kind, professional, and made the visit way better than expected.

I’m thankful for the high quality service received. Special thanks to Michelle.
The guy that took the blood sample was not very skillful.
Everyone involved in my care showed courtesy, compassion and skill .  Thank you!
Best urgent care I’ve been to! Excellent care with little ones. Very thorough, attention to detail, and care provided!!
The care I received was good. The nurse and doctor were both very professional.
Great friendly and fast service!
Excellent service.  Not much waiting time, and the medication dispenser is very convenient.

Excellent and caring staff and doctors. I was attended quickly and i am totally satisfied and grateful
THANK YOU!
Great and caring staff, too much to add. Recommend highly. A+

Excellent care in the emergency room. The doctor and all the staff were professional, kind, and compassionate. Everyone treated my son with respect and patience and made us feel supported during a stressful time. We truly appreciate the outstanding care provided by the entire team.

Good experience there very professional all.
C T tec. Francine was very professional.
Good and fast service
reviews.original_review_text: Buenas atencion y rapida

reviews.review_text: I received excellent care and assistance; the nurses and the doctor were very kind.
reviews.original_review_text: Me atendieron muy bien , y me ayudaron en todo , muy amable los enfermeros y la doctora

reviews.review_text: Good and speedy care of my health problem!
Excellent! I went with my daughter and they were very helpful and treated us very well. Dr. Cooper is very kind and they helped my daughter with everything she needed.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente , fui con mi hija y nos ayudaron mucho , nos trataron muy bien , Dra cooper es muy amable y ayudaron a mi hija en todo lo que necesitaba

reviews.review_text: Excellent customer service.

I didn’t come  to this location since at least 2 yrs ago until today, the experience was excellent the registration took me under three minutes and get inside just about 2 minutes. The whole process in and out just amazing the staff excellent , very very happy with the service
Great and quick care!
Was seen rapidly and felt the exam was very thorough. Went home very satisfied.
Fast service, very professional. Very clean and tidy.
reviews.original_review_text: Atención rápida, muy profesionales. Muy limpio y ordenado.

reviews.review_text: The attention was very good and very fast. I am very pleased wit the staff.
Excellent care and treatment from both Nurse Priscilla and Dr. Stacey. Despite how I was feeling, they were very kind and gentle. I highly recommend this place.
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena atención y trato, tanto de la enfermera Priscilla como de la Dra Stacey, a pesar de cómo me sentía fueron muy amables y dulces, recomendado este lugar 100%

reviews.review_text:
Absolutely amazing experience in the urgent care. From the moment I approached the desk, I was greeted with a warm and inviting smile. Both of the front desk attendants were friendly and very helpful.
My nurse practitioner also made me feel right at home. I was given quick and efficient care with an extra dose of love. Beatriz Ruiz was absolutely amazing! Very happy to have chosen this location to take care of my injuries. Would highly recommend!

The nurse that took care of me today was amazing. Her bedside manner and level of care was truly wonderful. Everyone was great but Priscilla stands out as a caring and very sweet medical professional. She is an asset to your organization.

I am very pleased with the care I received; they are very professional, especially the doctor who treated me. I don't remember his name, but I would like him to be recognized for his professionalism. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Estoy muy complacida con la atención recibida son muy profesionales en especial el doctor que me atendió no recuerdo el nombre pero quisiera que lo reconocieran por su profesionalidad gracias

reviews.review_text: The service was excellent, from reception to the doctor. Nurse Carolina, after checking my vital signs, listened to the reasons for my visit and was very understanding and concerned about how I was feeling. Within minutes, the doctor arrived and listened attentively to what I was saying. He was very kind, examined me, explained my diagnosis, and prescribed the necessary medication. I am very satisfied with the service and the time it took, and I feel confident that I am in very good hands. Thank you, Baptist Health, the doctor, and Carolina.
reviews.original_review_text: La atención fue excelente,  desde la recepción hasta el Dr. La enfermera Carolina  después de revisar mis signos vitales, escuchó las razones de mi visita y fue muy comprensiva y preocupada por mi sentir. En pocos minutos vino el Doctor y escuchó atentamente lo que le decía,  se mostró muy amable, me revisó y me explicó mi diagnóstico y me prescribió el medicamento necesario. Muy satisfecha del servicio, el tiempo y segura de estar en muy buenas manos. Gracias Baptist Health, Doctor y Carolina.

reviews.review_text:
They were professionals, they were kind and they were fast.
What else can I ask.
All of them. The front desk, the nurse and the doctor.
Thank you.
Excellent and professional health cay
I have always come to this place, service is fast and good customer service
Very attentive nurse and physician. Listened carefully, were gentle, and even offered me water! They addressed my needs and made me feel heard and care for.
Excellent care staff super courteous doctor excellent
My experience was great. The staff was friendly and knowledgeable. . Great place to go for your urgent care needs.
Easy everything, clean the bathroom and instalation, I am very satisfied with the doctor and nurses. Pay was easy. Time perfect.
Great they took care of me quick
I love Baptist. Good attention. Good professionals. Everything fine.
